title: Bolter
description: Change bow to iconic weapons from the Warhammer 40,000 universe!
body:
## If you think a bow in minecraft is boring, here's an alternative!
**To get the new bow variant, just renames bow to "Bolter" in English language.**

**Requires OptiFine or CIT.**

---
